summary: Iteration 26: Auth Login Gate - All features tested and working. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components working correctly including login screen, error handling, session persistence, and logout.
seed_data_creation: Admin credentials configured in backend/.env (ADMIN_USERNAME, ADMIN_PASSWORD)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 tested Auth Login Gate feature. All backend APIs working: POST /api/auth/login (returns token, username, role), GET /api/auth/me (validates token via Bearer header or cookie), POST /api/auth/logout (clears cookie). Frontend: LoginScreen component with testids login-screen, login-form, login-username, login-password, login-submit, login-error. Logout button in header with testid logout-btn. Auth gate in App.js checks localStorage for 'recra_token' on load, validates via /api/auth/me. Token stored in localStorage as 'recra_token', user data as 'recra_user'. All 6 flows (Recreatie, Chalet, FEC, Dashboard, Roadmap, Leveranciersbeheer) still work after login.

backend_apis: POST /api/auth/login - correct credentials returns token + username + role
GET /api/auth/me - valid Bearer token returns username + role
POST /api/auth/logout - clears cookie and returns success
frontend_ui: Login screen appears when not authenticated (no token in localStorage)
Login form has username field, password field, submit button
Wrong credentials show error message 'Ongeldige gebruikersnaam of wachtwoord'
FlowSelector shows all 6 cards after login
User data persisted in localStorage as 'recra_user'
Page reload keeps user logged in (session persistence)
Logout button in header clears session and shows login screen
All existing flows (Recreatie, Chalet, FEC, Dashboard, Roadmap, Leveranciersbeheer) still work

ui_test_results.login_form_elements: PASS - Username, password, submit button present
ui_test_results.session_persistence: PASS - Stays logged in after reload
ui_test_results.logout_functionality: PASS - Clears session, shows login screen
ui_test_results.existing_flows: PASS - All 6 flows work after login
